headline: Foreign Disinformation Operations From 12 Countries Detected
context: Intelligence agencies detected election disinformation from 12 countries targeting Malaysian social media users in 2025.

cards.big: Disinformation from 12 countries targeted Malaysian elections in 2025
cards.sub: Foreign actors amplified racial and religious divisions through campaigns

cards.big: 4,500 fake accounts linked to foreign operations identified and removed
cards.sub: Networks operated across Facebook TikTok and Twitter/X in Malaysian language

cards.big: Operations from 3 countries focused on amplifying racial tensions
cards.sub: Content reached 8.5 million Malaysians before detection and removal

cards.big: MCMC coordinated with platforms to remove 85% of identified accounts
cards.sub: Remaining 15% switched to encrypted platforms where monitoring impossible

cards.big: Foreign disinformation tests whether platform cooperation can protect elections from outside interference
Disinformation from 12 countries detected. Foreign influence operations exploit domestic polarisation as an entry point.
